name: PornHub
description: PornHub plugin for Grayjay - search, channels, comments, recommendations, login, history & migration
author: mr. X

authentication.userAgent: Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64; rv:143.0) Gecko/20100101 Firefox/143.0

14: Fix 404 / Failed-to-fetch on imported playlists: every http.GET call now passes useAuth=true so Grayjay's captured login cookies are attached;
Broader playlist-video parser (handles /likedvideos, /subscriptions, /playlist/watchlater and per-user lists which use slightly different markup);
Anchor-fallback playlist-list parser so /users/<id>/playlists tiles aren't missed;
More reliable user-path detection via /account redirect URL (covers accounts whose dropdown HTML differs);
13: Fix import-empty bug: resolved canonical user path (e.g. /users/9fa60b0/) so subscription / playlist / history endpoints actually receive the correct user id;
Subscriptions import now aggregates User, Pornstar and Channel subscriptions (3 endpoints);
Playlists import now includes Favorites, Watch Later, Liked Videos and Subscriptions Feed as virtual playlists;
Fixed Favorites path (/videos/favorites, American spelling) and Watch Later path (/playlist/watchlater);
Channel handling now also recognizes /users/<name>/ profiles so user-account subscriptions actually work;
12: Added Sign-in support (Grayjay built-in login web view);
Added Import of subscribed pornstars / models / channels;
Added Import of user playlists, plus virtual Favorites & Watch Later;
Added Sync of remote watch history (Pornhub -> Grayjay);
Added Search filters: Date, Duration, Quality (HD), Production, Sort order;
Added Search types: Videos, Playlists, Creators;
Added Playlist URL handling and full playlist details;
10: Added channel statistics to description (total videos, views, subscribers);
Implemented dynamic social media link extraction for channels, pornstars, and models;
Fixed author URLs in channel content to show full channel URL instead of username;
Implemented httpGET wrapper with automatic session management and bot detection bypass;
Increased retry attempts to 3 with 1-second delay between retries;
